creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 187360
patch to change german/ding dependency to tk85

Because of the planned deprecation of x11-toolkits/tk84 the port german/ding also gets an expiration date.

The appended patch updates the dependency from x11-toolkits/tk84 to x11-toolkits/tk85. ding seems to work fine, so the expiration date should not be necessary any more.


Tested with Poudriere (HEADa/i, 11.1a/i, 10.4a/i). 'portlint -AC' seems to be happy.
